attacking_style: Launches late-race attacks in final 1-3km or from penultimate climbs, but often misjudges sustainability of efforts. Opportunistic breakaway rider who exploits mechanicals and rival weakness rather than pure power domination.
team_tactics: AG2R showed ruthless attacking discipline when exploiting rival mechanicals (2017). By 2023 relegated to domestique/leadout duties at DSM, indicating loss of protected team status and GC leadership role.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes and multi-climb stages where tactical positioning matters more than sustained watts. Struggles on sustained high-altitude tempo efforts and time trials where pacing strategy repeatedly fails.
vulnerability: Cannot follow sustained high-altitude tempo (dropped by Roglič), poor time trial execution with equipment/pacing errors, lacks power to sustain long solo efforts (19km caught). Physically fragile with multiple mechanicals/crashes ending campaigns.
key_patterns: Repeatedly misjudges effort sustainability: 19km solo caught, mid-TT bike change disaster, poor pacing strategy (3 instances)
Exploits time bonuses and tactical chaos rather than raw climbing dominance (bonus sprints, mechanical attacks)
Form fragility: chain throws, crashes, 12-minute losses suggest physical vulnerability compounds bad luck (3 races)
Declining status: GC podium contender 2017-2022, demoted to domestique duties by 2023 at DSM
Time trial weakness consistently hemorrhages GC time through equipment and pacing errors (2019 examples)
form_trajectory: negative: Declined from GC podium contender (2017-2022) to domestique role (2023). Recent attacks lack sustained power despite aggressive intent. Physical fragility and tactical errors compounding.
